items.summary: Initialize the Super Admin role in the backend by setting the principal ID 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' as the Super Admin principal in the main actor's initialization logic

Add a Super Admin recovery mechanism in the AdminDashboardPage that allows the principal 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' to reinitialize Super Admin access if it was lost
